title: Charred Zesty Kenyan Pickle Skillet
description: A flavorful, paleo-friendly skillet dish featuring charred dill pickles, infused oil, and a crispy crust.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: infused with 1 tsp garlic powder and 1 tsp dried oregano

instructions: Heat the infused olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 3 minutes, until slightly charred.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add the sliced dill pickles and cook for 2 minutes, until they start to soften.
Sprinkle the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper over the top.
Pour in the chicken broth and coconut cream, and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes, until the liquid has thickened and the top is crispy.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley, if using.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
